name: totonoe-knowledge
description: 調査や会話を、検索・再利用できるMarkdownナレッジへ整えるVS Code拡張

untrustedWorkspaces.description: ナレッジの読み書きとLanguage Model Toolを使用するため、信頼済みワークスペースでのみ有効化します。

commands.title: Totonoe Knowledge: AIでクリップボードから登録
Totonoe Knowledge: AIを使わずクリップボードから登録
Totonoe Knowledge: AIで選択範囲から登録
Totonoe Knowledge: AIを使わず選択範囲から登録
Totonoe Knowledge: Select Knowledge Repository Folder
Totonoe Knowledge: この内容を登録

languageModelTools.name: totonoe-knowledge_saveKnowledge
languageModelTools.userDescription: 会話で整理した内容を確認付きでMarkdownナレッジとして保存します。
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Save a structured internal project knowledge entry as Markdown. Use when the user explicitly asks to record a conclusion, investigation, procedure, decision, specification, change, or troubleshooting result. The tool always asks the user for confirmation before writing. Do not use it for temporary notes or when required facts are still unknown. Never infer appliesFrom, appliesTo, or supersedesKnowledgeIds; include them only when the user or cited evidence states them explicitly.

title.description: Specific title that identifies the knowledge later

appliesFrom.description: Inclusive first applicable version, only when explicitly stated by the user or evidence; omit rather than infer

appliesTo.description: Inclusive last applicable version, only when explicitly stated by the user or evidence; omit rather than infer

relatedKnowledgeIds.description: Existing related knowledge IDs; omit rather than guess

supersedesKnowledgeIds.description: Older knowledge IDs explicitly replaced by this entry; only use when stated by the user or cited evidence, and omit rather than infer

sourceReferences.description: Relevant files, issues, commits, or document references

languageModelTools.name: totonoe-knowledge_searchKnowledge
languageModelTools.userDescription: ワークスペースに蓄積したプロジェクトナレッジを検索します。
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search the workspace's internal Markdown knowledge for existing specifications, past investigations, known issues, historical decisions, procedures, or troubleshooting cases. Use when the answer may depend on project-specific history. Return concise references; do not treat results as current without checking their status and scope.

query.description: Search terms derived from the user's question

version.description: Optional target version used to keep only applicable, non-superseded entries, for example 17.1 or RHEL9.2

totonoeKnowledge.repositoryPath.description: 外部リポジトリを選択していない場合に、ワークスペースからの相対パスで指定するMarkdownナレッジ保存先

enumDescriptions: 意味検索を無効にし、全文・メタデータ検索だけを使用します
ローカルの Ollama /api/embed を使用してハイブリッド検索します
totonoeKnowledge.embedding.provider.description: 意味検索に使用する Embedding Provider。明示的に ollama を選ぶまでナレッジ本文は送信されません

totonoeKnowledge.embedding.ollama.endpoi.description: Ollama のローカル URL。安全のため HTTP の localhost、127.0.0.1、または ::1 のみ使用できます

totonoeKnowledge.embedding.ollama.model.description: Ollama で事前に取得しておく Embedding モデル名

totonoeKnowledge.embedding.minimumSimila.description: 意味検索のtop-k候補へ適用する任意のコサイン類似度下限。既定の-1では絶対下限を設けません

enumDescriptions: 登録時にAI生成またはAIを使わない登録を選択する
AIへ送信せず、構造化済みMarkdownの読込または通常テキスト用の入力テンプレートを使用する
VS Codeで選択したAIモデルを使用して要約・分類・本文を生成する
totonoeKnowledge.generator.description: ナレッジ案の生成方法

totonoeKnowledge.secretScanning.enabled.description: 外部送信前と登録プレビュー作成時に秘密情報らしい文字列を検査する

scripts.copy:sqlite-wasm: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const source=path.dirname(require.resolve('sql.js/dist/sql-wasm.js')); fs.mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true}); for(const file of ['sql-wasm.js','sql-wasm.wasm']) fs.copyFileSync(path.join(source,file),path.join('dist',file))"
scripts.copy:sqlite-wasm:integration: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs'); const path=require('node:path'); const source=path.dirname(require.resolve('sql.js/dist/sql-wasm.js')); const target=path.join('.integration-test','suite'); fs.mkdirSync(target,{recursive:true}); for(const file of ['sql-wasm.js','sql-wasm.wasm']) fs.copyFileSync(path.join(source,file),path.join(target,file))"
scripts.compile: npm run compile:extension && npm run compile:mcp && npm run copy:sqlite-wasm
scripts.compile:all: npm run compile && npm run compile:integration
scripts.package: npm run check && npm test && npm run compile && npm run test:mcp
